verses.text: Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in ama paina ding khua leh mun khempeuhah nih nihin a na pai dingin mi sawmsagih seh a, ama mai-ah a mapaisak hi
Amaute kiangah, “Anlak ding tam mahmah a, ahi zongin mi tawm bek in anlak na sem uh hi. Tua ahih manin anneipa in a ante a la dingin mi hong sawlna dingin thu ngen un
Note va kuan un. Ngiahon lakah tuuno khah bangin note ka hong sawl hi
Sum ahi a, ip ahi a, khedap a val ahi zongin keng kei un. Lamkalah mi tawh kimawk hoho kei un
Inn khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin, ‘Hih inn-ah nopsakna hong tung ta hen,’ ci-in hopih masa un
Tua innsungah nopsakna a ngahthei ding mi a om leh kip paisuak ding a, a om kei leh na hopihna thupha uh na dokkik ding uh hi
Nasemte in a thaman a ngahding a kilawm ahih mah bangin na zintun'na inn mah uhah omsuak un la, a hong piak peuhpeuh uh na ne un. Na zintun'na inn uh kheel themthum kei un
Khua khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin note hong tun'sak leh, amaute' hong lui peuhpeuh ne un la
tua khuasunga cinate damsak un. A khuamite kiangah, ‘Pasian' Ukna ding hun note-a' dingin hong naita hi,’ ci-in gen un
Ahi zongin khua khat peuhpeuhah na lut uh ciangin note hong tun'saknop kei leh a khuasung kongzingah pai un la
‘Na khuasung uha leivui, ka khe tung uhah a hong bangte nangawn, note hilhkholhna-in ka nulkhia uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian' Ukna ding hun a hong naina thu thei ta un,’ ci-in gen un
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, Thukhen Ni ciangin Sodom khuamite' thuakding sangin tua khuamite' thuakding haksazaw lai ding hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Khorazin khuapi mite leh Bethsaida khuapi mite aw, gimna lianpi na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khuasungah a hong kilak na lamdangte, Taia leh Sidon khuasungah kilak hi leh amaute in kisikna limin sawtpekin puanhampi silhin vut kinuh ding uh hi
Tua ahih manin Thukhen Ni ciangin Taia leh Sidon khuapi mite' thuakding sangin note' thuakding haksazaw lai ding hi
No Kapernaum khuapi mite aw, van a sangna munah hong kipahtawi ding sa na hi uh hiam? Hell khuk sungah hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note' thu a hong zuite khempeuh, kei' thu a hong zui hi a, note' thu a hong zuilote khempeuh, kei' thu a hong zuilo ahi uh hi. Kei' thu a hong zuilote khempeuh pen kei a hong sawlpa' thu a zuilo ahi uh hi,” a ci hi.
Sawmsagihte lungdam mahmahin hong ciahkik uh a, “Topa aw, nangma min tawh dawite nangawn ka hawlkhiazo uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Vantung panin keekkia bangin Satan a kiatna ka mu hi
Tu-in thei un. Gulpi leh momaite na sikgawpna ding uh leh na galte uh na zawhna dingun note tungah vangliatna ka hong piazo a, amaute in note bangmah hong cih zolo ding uh hi
Ahi zongin dawite in na thu uh hong man'na hangin lungdam kei un la, vantungah na min uh a kigelh manin lungdamzaw un,” a ci hi.

Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in lungdamna tawh Jesuh kidimsak hi. Jesuh in, “Vantung leh leitung Topa ahi ka Pa aw, mipilte leh misiamte tungah na ip thute, bangmah a theilo hih mite tungah lak na hih manin ka nuam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen nangma deihna bang ahi hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Hih nate khempeuh ka Pa in kei tungah hong ap khinzo hi. Pasian simloh, Tapa a thei kuamah omlo hi. Tapa leh Tapa in a theihsaknop mite simloh, Pa a thei kuamah omlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin nungzuite lamah kihei a, “Tu-a na muh uh nate na muh manun a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, kamsang tampite leh kumpi tampite in tu-a note' muhte a muhnop uh hangin mu ngeilo uh a, a zaknop uh hangin za ngeilo uh hi,” ci-in a tuamin a gen hi.
Jesuh a ze-et dingin Thukham hilh siate khat hong ding a, “Sia aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngahtheihna dingin bang sem ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh in, “Thukham sungah bang kigelh a, bang sim na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Na Topa Pasian na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na hatna khempeuh, leh na pilna khempeuh tawh na it in la, nangmah na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” ci-in kigelh hi, ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Na dawn'na man mahmah hi. Tua bangin gamta lecin nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Thukham hilh siapa amah kitangsak nuam ahih manin Jesuh kiangah, “Ka vengte i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh in dawng a, “Jerusalem panin Jerikho khua-ah mi khat paisuk a, lamkalah migilote in na suam a, a neih khempeuh laksakin a satgawp khit uh ciangin nusia uh a, a si dektaksa-in a paisan uh hi
Tua laitakin siampi khat tua lampi tawnin hong paisuk a, amah a muh ciangin lamnawl lam tawnin a paisan hi
Tua ciangin Levi mi khat zong tua mah bangin hong pai a, amah a muh ciangin lamnawl lam tawnin a paisan leuleu hi
Ahi zongin Samaria mi khualzin khat, tua lai mun hong tungin a liampa a muh ciangin hehpihhuaisa a
a kiangah va pai-in a liammate sathau leh leenggahzu a nuhsak khit ciangin a tunsak hi. Tua ciangin a la tungah tuangsak a, zintun' inn khatah paipihin tua lai-ah a khoi hi
A zingsang ciangin zintun' inn neipa kiangah sum peek nih pia a, ‘Hih mipa limtakin na khoi in. Na beina dang khempeuh, kong paikik ciangin kong loh ding hi,’ ci hi
Hih mihing thumte sung panin, a kisuampa-a' dingin a koi pen a vengpa hi dingin na um hiam?” a ci hi
Amah in, “A hehpihpa hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Nang zong pai in la, tua bangmahin gamta in,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Martha leh Mary kiangah Jesuh Hawh

verses.text: Amaute a pai laitakun khua khatah Jesuh bang a, Martha kici numei khat in a inn-ah na tungsak hi
Martha in Mary kici nau numei khat nei a, Topa' thugente ngai-in Mary a om hi
Martha bek in na semin manlah mahmah ahih manin a heh suak a, “Topa aw, ka naunu in kei bek na hong sepsak niloh phamawh salo na hi hiam? Kei hong huhna dingin hong sawl in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Topa in, “Martha, Martha aw, nang na lunghihmawhna tam hi
Ahi zongin a kisam taktak khat bek om a, Mary in tua a kisam na pen a semsem ahih manin, a nasep kikhawlsak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
